name: mcp-remote-macos-use
description: A zero-installation solution for AI agents to control remote macOS systems. Full desktop capabilities without extra software, using only built-in Screen Sharing. Works with Claude and any MCP client, offering native macOS experience with minimal setup and no additional API costs.
